infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MemoryMate uses the camera to recognize familiar faces.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MemoryMate needs your location to check if you are within a safe zone.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: MemoryMate needs background location to alert your caregiver if you leave your safe zone.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MemoryMate uses the microphone to listen to your voice commands.

plugins.cameraPermission: MemoryMate uses the camera to recognize familiar faces.
